song.title: Endless Tabs
song.keywords: porn addiction, isolation, endless tabs, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Endless Tabs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Endless Tabs Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Endless Tabs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Endless Tabs Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Endless Tabs' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Deepening addiction.

essay: Endless Tabs maps porn and app overload as a modern attention trap. The song shows how infinite novelty can numb connection, making desire abundant but satisfaction unreachable.

nextInStory.title: Maybe I Took It Too Far

song.lyricsHtml:
Another night
Another search
Another tab

Ten tabs open bodies blur
Faces fade but I'm still sure
Alone in the dark I don't look away
The night dissolves it's always this way

Endless tabs endless need
Stroke release repeat repeat
Endless tabs the glow the screen
I'm chasing ghosts I've never seen
Repeat repeat repeat

Calls go unanswered the daylight dies
Curtains closed I live in lies
No touch no warmth no human face
Just endless tabs I can't erase

Endless tabs I fade away
Stroke release repeat all day
Endless tabs I'm sinking fast
I reach for love but it never lasts
Repeat repeat repeat

Endless tabs I can't get free
Stroke release consuming me
Endless tabs I'm lost inside
The more I click the more I hide
Repeat repeat repeat

Oh wow they have broadcasted streams happening in real time

Now the cams are glowing they dance for me
Bodies moving like fantasy
A coin buys a smile but it's only pretend
I pay for a stranger to call me friend

Click click one more shot
Scroll it down I've lost the plot
Play pause rewind reload
Ten more tabs and I'll explode

Endless tabs I've lost control
Stroke release it eats my soul
Endless tabs I'm on my knees
Stroke release repeat repeat
Repeat repeat repeat

I don't even know their names
They are just pixels
Pixels and me
